text: Carla, Carla, there's a real, there's a real tornado right there. Oh my God! If something happens, I'll make sure everybody knows I love them, Carla. This is no joke. There's a real tornado right there. Oh my God! Oh my God! Oh my God! Ooh! You think? You think it was close? Look, see where there's no lights, dude. Went right, like maybe five blocks away at the most. Went right through there, dude. Wiped out. The only lights in that path is ambulances, fire trucks, all the way around downtown. Yeah, it was. Yeah, dude. There was no storm. There was no nothing. Then, look. That's gone again.
